mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id, p.team_id, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COALESCE(task_stats.total_tasks, 0) AS total_tasks, COALESCE(task_stats.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks FROM projects p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tl.project_id, COUNT(tk.task_id) AS total_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks FROM task_lists tl LEFT JOIN tasks tk ON tl.list_id = tk.list_id GROUP BY tl.project_id ) task_stats ON p.project_id = task_stats.project_id WHERE p.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.project_id, p.team_id, t.name AS team_name, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COALESCE(task_stats.total_tasks, 0) AS total_tasks, COALESCE(task_stats.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks, COALESCE(task_stats.in_progress_tasks, 0) AS in_progress_tasks, COALESCE(task_stats.todo_tasks, 0) AS todo_tasks FROM projects p INNER JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.team_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tl.project_id, COUNT(tk.task_id) AS total_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '进行中' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS in_progress_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '待办' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todo_tasks FROM task_lists tl LEFT JOIN tasks tk ON tl.list_id = tk.list_id GROUP BY tl.project_id ) task_stats ON p.project_id = task_stats.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT s.stage_id, s.project_id, s.name, s.description, s.order_index, s.start_date, s.end_date, s.status, COUNT(tk.task_id) AS stage_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stage_completed FROM stages s LEFT JOIN tasks tk ON s.stage_id = tk.stage_id LEFT JOIN task_lists tl ON tk.list_id = tl.list_id WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY s.stage_id, s.project_id, s.name, s.description, s.order_index, s.start_date, s.end_date, s.status ORDER BY s.order_index ASC
